## nsc exec-scoped

Runs the specified command (e.g. a script) with the corresponding environment variables set, based on the services selected (e.g. DOCKER_HOST, KUBECONFIG).

```
nsc exec-scoped --service=docker|kubernetes <clusterid> <cmd...> [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help              help for exec-scoped
      --service strings   Which services to inject, any of: docker, kubernetes
```
